summary:
I’ve fixed the getter for Ref‐typed fields in src/codegen.rs so they return a reference instead of an owned value. In the `FieldType::Ref` arm of `generate_getter` I changed

    pub fn foo(&self) -> Foo {
        &self.foo
    }

to

    pub fn foo(&self) -> &Foo {
        &self.foo
    }

Re-running `bash test.sh` now shows:

=== Code Generation Engine Tests ===  
…  
PASS: simple accessor tests  
PASS: complex nested accessor tests  
PASS: All code generation tests passed

which verifies that nested accessors now have the correct `&Type` signatures.
